sections.heading: New
items: New ElevenLabs models: ElevenLabs SFX, Voice Isolator, Dubbing.
Audio scrubbing: + timeline meter: audio per frame scrubbing and a stereo dBFS meter for monitoring audio levels.

sections.heading: Fixed
items: 65-point .cube LUTs: Support 65-point .cube LUTs for color grading.
Chroma key eyedropper: Fix chroma key issue and add a more precise eyedropper.
